solara.boon_line: Solara warms the fields — a bountiful harvest fills the larders.
solara.wrath_line: Solara turns her face away; a blight creeps through the crops.

morrik.boon_line: Morrik blesses the realm's warriors — the watch stands taller.
morrik.wrath_line: The Battle-Father, restless in the quiet, looses strife upon the land.

grimble.boon_line: Grimble smiles on the trade — coin flows and the coffers swell.
grimble.wrath_line: Grimble shutters his purse; a lean season falls on the markets.

veyra.boon_line: Veyra keeps the roads — travellers pass safe and trade thrives.
veyra.wrath_line: Veyra withdraws her protection; the roads grow perilous.

pale_lady.boon_line: The Pale Lady grants a gentle passing; the realm makes peace with its dead.
pale_lady.wrath_line: The Pale Lady walks abroad; a pall of death settles on the land.

storm_line: The gods contend in the heavens — the weather turns wild and strange.
